entries.impact: Bears subagent and GitHub Project development governance now has dedicated skills plus a GitHub Projects and Issues orchestrator role that keeps parent agents control-only, routes L3 implementation to exact @Bears roles, and records Project, Issue, PR, Actions, and Release metadata boundaries.

Bears local_cd contract uses local image build/load evidence without external registry publishing, and the platform build docs route is exact so local-image documentation can be edited without broad platform fallback.
Plugin cache sync now falls back to exact local commit validation when async validation state is queued, so a pushed plugin commit can refresh the local Codex cache immediately after push.

Clarification Architect now has typed schemas, bounded fixtures, a read-only helper profile, route-gate coverage, doctor visibility, generated-agent registration metadata, and local-commit-validation selection coverage before planning or implementation.

Roadmap reconcile now preserves disabled states, blocks evidence-only promotion without resource-conflict authority, requires resource gate allow plus a schema-bound transition packet before validated promotion, keeps manual_review and hazard nodes blocked until an approved packet exists, and keeps the decision ledger within the compact closeout limit.
Add a release notes gate for behavior-changing plugin policy, workflow, hook, schema, validator, delivery, and manifest changes.
Add an authority map that identifies canonical, secondary, generated, and deprecated surfaces for major plugin topics.
Add a canonical plugin worktree closeout gate so hidden temporary worktrees or redirected core.worktree state cannot replace /srv/bears/plugins/bears during final @Bears reporting.

Link automated delivery closeout to the #384 release-note gate with manifest release_gate state, delivery-id references, explicit exemptions, release summaries, and bears_doctor release-gate reporting.
Add covered issue classifications to delivery manifests and enforce solved-open reconciliation before closeout.
Adds bounded old open backlog reconciliation with exact-proof closure rules and phase_2 classification for rows without proof.
Adds default-deny MCP tool policy for exec agents.
Adds context surface scanning, split decisions, mixed-authority detection, and bounded section selection for skill and role surfaces.
Adds compact per-commit agent usage events, commit ledgers, and token regression diffs without storing raw prompts, chat, logs, secrets, or production data.
Adds role degradation events and remediation plans that block repeated fixer loops and require audit for invalid role output.
Adds GitOps delivery state, degradation events, rollback policy, and doctor-visible closeout gates.
Add repo-visible external review audit enforcement with schema, catalog, CLI validation, delivery checks, and doctor/test-selection/artifact-registry integration.
Adds workspace semantic graph, dictionary, and metadata store policy with bounded JSON query commands.
Add metadata coverage for the formal semantics kernel so validators route semantic type, relation, catalog, script, doc, and test changes through #435 checks and bears_doctor status.
Add executable question calculus and decision graph validators so material workflow gates unlock only from accepted answer proofs that reference #435 semantic facts.
Add deterministic Datalog-style workflow inference so accepted facts derive permissions with proof traces while candidate facts only route research or manual review.
Add formal workflow state-machine semantics so goals advance only through allowed transitions, evidence gates, and invariant checks.
Adds code property graph extraction for Python and JSON governed files with stale source-hash checks.
Adds proof-driven prompt compiler and bounded context-pack assembly.
Adds process-mining comparison, non-fitting trace detection, validator-gap candidates, context-budget candidates, and dry-run deduped issue candidates.
Add a sanitized read-only bears-infra evidence adapter and wire infra packet failures into GitOps degradation scans.
Add deterministic capability harness levels, bootstrap/external/subagent modes, usage ledgers, progress reports, cost-quality reports, and legacy stub compatibility commands.
Add a read-only policy invariant gate that blocks solved-open, unsafe auto-close, missing changelog, missing decision, and forbidden raw data cases.
Add impacted test graph, delivery validation wrapper, external-review contract pilot, and Temporal adoption evaluation for issues #459-#463.
Add a bears_doctor component coverage reconciler that detects missing doctor checks, validator commands, test-selection mappings, closed issue gaps, and unsafe autostart gaps.

Make local_commit_validation the single normal commit gate: staged or commit diff flows through pants_test_graph and test-selection into a validation plan, uncovered files fail, bears_commit blocks failed commits, and closeout rejects proof without a passing plan.
Activate Bears Infisical and Kubernetes ops skills in the plugin catalog and add validation routing so plugin-surface skill inventory changes remain high-confidence for local commit validation.

Normalize Bears platform route ownership to the canonical /srv/bears/dev/platform checkout, preserve legacy readiness packet compatibility in code, block broad Kubernetes stateful-backend parent fallback, and keep archive manifests storage-only.
Register exact Kubernetes data-platform role routes for Redis, Taskiq, ClickHouse, and PostgreSQL manifest lanes without granting live kubectl, secret, image push, or product-code authority.
Register question-answer ledger route ownership to the machine-first execution kernel as route metadata only, keeping future ledger code behind exact role-gate coverage.
Bound decision-ledger report output to the latest 50 records while preserving total_record_count so local commit validation stays compact as the ledger grows.
